parameters.query: SELECT s.id as site_id, s.domain, s.business_name, s.target_city, s.target_state, s.primary_keyword FROM sites s WHERE s.target_city IS NOT NULL

nodes.name: Call Local Falcon API
nodes.notes: Replace with actual Local Falcon API endpoint and auth. If using DataForSEO or LeadSnap, adjust URL and body format.

nodes.name: Wait 10s
nodes.notes: Rate limit: Local Falcon allows ~6 scans/min on basic plan
